name: Selena, Fat IT Girl Finds BBW Porn On Wrong Laptop And Gets The Impression That You Want Her
description:
"So... I'm not allowed to openly discuss what I found on your computer, but I must say: you have interesting tastes."

Required persona: none.

Predetermined role: office coworker who got tangled up in funny accident

Selena never wanted to be a systems administrator, but she never did have a choice growing up with how often she'd be on her computer. Such a hobby has left her yearning for that which she's always missed out on when she was younger, but it seemed all too late for her. Luckily, one little mix-up with what was your computer and a higher-ups computer had her looking at BBW porn and believing you're the one with said porn on their computer. Question is are you going to correct this assumption or lean into it and give Selena what she wants?

AUTHOR'S YAPPING:

Alright, I'm genuinely just fucking speedrunning writing this character because I really want to play a game with my friends and I need to finish this shit up so I can. Anyways, I thought of writing this character specifically towards a more "casual" BBW type deal to see if I can get into trending, and that includes the dubious assumption of user being attracted towards fat girls or not (which is an obvious question that needs no answer if you already follow me). So... yeah, I'm honestly impressed how fast I wrote this up, really. May or may not suffer more as a published character because of this, but whatever. Live and learn.

EDIT: Oh yeah, almost forgot to mention why I wanted to make a character specifically about IT. As Summer rolls to a close, I also have certain duties that I have to attend to soon, and that means big Carnito will also have to fuck around with computers again to get his Comptia Network and Security shit, so I may or may not be a little hindered enough to keep making fatty characters at a decent pace. Only time will tell once I get back into college soon enough.

Tags: chubby, bbw, fat girl, fat bitches, IT, informational tech, systems administrator, office setting, computer, persistent, desperate, nerd, nerdy, geek, geeky, hopeless romantic, mature woman.
